ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the wrestling season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the season belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weight_classes" (
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weight class */,
  "weight_class" INTEGER /* Weight class value (e.g., 157) */,
  "min_weight" INTEGER /* Minimum weight for the class */,
  "max_weight" INTEGER /* Maximum weight for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weight_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wrestlers" (
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wrestler */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the wrestler */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the wrestler */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the wrestler belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Wrestler's date of birth */,
  "height" TEXT /* Wrestler's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Wrestler's weight */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Year the wrestler is expected to graduate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wrestler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wrestlers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the wrestling team */,
  "school" TEXT /* Name of the school the team represents */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the team belongs to */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrestler being ranked */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the ranking belongs to */,
  "week_number" TEXT /* Week number the ranking was recorded */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class the ranking belongs to */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking value */,
  "elo_rank" REAL /* EloRank value */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Previous rank of the wrestler */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the wrestler */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_wrestler_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_week_number FOREIGN KEY ("week_number") REFERENCES weeks ("week_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_number" TEXT /* Week number (e.g., 21, Preseason) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the week belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, wrestler) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the conference is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "wrestler_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wrestler */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent wrestler */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week */,
  "weight_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weight class */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_wrestler_id FOREIGN KEY ("wrestler_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_weight_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("weight_class_id") REFERENCES weight_classes ("weight_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES wrestlers ("wrestler_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
column_names: ID of the conference the season belongs to
Unique identifier for each weight class
ID of the team the wrestler belongs to
Year the wrestler is expected to graduate
Name of the school the team represents
